Chieh Wu
Chieh Wu is an assistant teaching professor at Khoury College. A prolific machine learning scholar and a specialist in kernel methods, Wu strives to blend those areas with biology, and to discover a unifying mathematical theory for neural networks.

Yuxi Wu
Yuxi Wu is a distinguished research fellow at Khoury College. Her research critically explores the intersection of privacy and security, human-computer interaction, and design, with the goal of empowering people to collectively demand accountability for institutional privacy harms.

Xiaoyi Yang
Xiaoyi Yang is an assistant teaching professor at Khoury College. She teaches machine learning courses, and loves working with students and her community while continuing her own learning.
